positive: A highly detailed, stylized vector illustration of an ethereal forest scene. The composition should feature a central silhouette of woodland creatures (foxes, deer, rabbits) interacting with bioluminescent, exaggerated flora and swirling magical elements. The style must be minimalist yet detailed, utilizing strong, graphic outlines and clean solid blocks of color. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, teal, emerald green, and accents of warm gold and burnt orange. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for optimal visibility on apparel. Hyper-clean line art, perfect symmetry, graphic novel quality, print-ready, flat design, stylized wildlife illustration, deep depth of field, clean silhouettes.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, poor quality, artifacts, deformed, ugly, dirty, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy lines, gradient, photographic, realistic, photorealism
